title: Build lottery game with ticket purchase and drawing system

requirements.text: Implement backend lottery state management with ticket tracking, drawing rounds, and winner selection logic in the main actor
acceptanceCriteria: Backend maintains current lottery round state
System tracks all purchased tickets with owner information
Random winner selection mechanism is implemented
Drawing history is persisted across canister upgrades

requirements.text: Create ticket purchase functionality allowing users to buy lottery tickets with unique identifiers
acceptanceCriteria: Users can purchase tickets through the frontend interface
Each ticket is assigned a unique identifier
Backend validates and records ticket purchases
Purchase confirmation is displayed to users

requirements.text: Build lottery drawing mechanism to randomly select winners from purchased tickets
acceptanceCriteria: System conducts drawings to select winners
Winner selection is verifiably random
Drawing can be triggered appropriately
Results are recorded and accessible

requirements.text: Create results viewing interface displaying lottery outcomes, winning tickets, and drawing history
acceptanceCriteria: Users can view current lottery status
Winning ticket numbers are displayed clearly
Historical drawing results are accessible
User's own tickets and wins are highlighted

requirements.text: Design a vibrant, playful visual theme with lottery-inspired aesthetics including ticket motifs, number displays, and engaging color palette that creates an exciting gaming atmosphere
acceptanceCriteria: Consistent visual theme across all lottery interfaces
Engaging color scheme that evokes lottery excitement
Clear typography for numbers and ticket information
Lottery-themed UI elements and visual motifs

requirements.text: Integrate generated lottery-themed images as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated
acceptanceCriteria: Generated images are placed in frontend/public/assets/generated directory
Images are referenced correctly in React components
Assets load properly in the application

constraints: Use single-actor Motoko architecture for all backend logic
Maintain Internet Identity integration for user authentication
Do not modify immutable frontend paths including hooks and UI components
nonGoals: Real-time multiplayer features or WebSocket connections

required: Colorful lottery ticket illustration with number grid and lottery branding (lottery-ticket.dim_400x250.png)
Golden trophy or prize icon for winners display (winner-trophy.dim_128x128.png)
Background pattern with subtle lottery ball motifs for main interface (lottery-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
